heading: Mileage books: commutation tickets
label: 8265 Mileage books: commutation tickets
text: The Secretary of the Navy may buy such mileage books, commutation tickets, and other similar transportation tickets as he considers necessary, and he may furnish them to persons ordered to perform travel on official business. Payment for those tickets before the travel is performed is not an advance of public money within the meaning of subsections (a) and (b) of .section 3324 of title 31
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6154.34 U.S.C. 891, (6th par., 2d sentence).Apr. 27, 1904, ch. 163033 Stat. 403The words “to continue” and the words “upon their receipt in accordance with commercial usage” are omitted as surplusage. The word “persons” is substituted for the words “officers and others”.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 6154 of this title1984— substituted “subsections (a) and (b) of section 3324” for “section 3324(a) and (b)”.Pub. L. 98–5251982— substituted “section 3324(a) and (b)” for “section 529”.Pub. L. 97–258
